name: vibe-tutor
description: Concise, diff-based tutoring for recent Codex code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Learn coding from the actual changes Codex just made.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Tutor pairs agentic coding with concise, diff-based, just-in-time tutoring so beginners can gradually understand the code they are building.
defaultPrompt: Use Vibe Tutor to explain the latest diff.
Use Vibe Tutor to quiz me on the change you just made.
